name: Automate Tests Workflow
description: Generate automated test suites for existing features that lack coverage.

steps.description: Analyze current test coverage and identify gaps
Define test strategy for uncovered areas
steps.exit_criteria: Test types and approaches defined for each gap

steps.description: Generate unit tests for uncovered functions
steps.exit_criteria: Unit tests created for priority functions

steps.description: Generate integration tests for uncovered flows
steps.exit_criteria: Integration tests created for key flows

steps.description: Generate E2E tests for critical user journeys
steps.exit_criteria: E2E tests created for critical paths

steps.description: Review generated tests for quality and coverage

success_criteria: Test coverage improved with quality automated tests
